name: Ace of Wands
meaning_upright: Inspiration, new opportunity, creative spark, enthusiasm, potential.
meaning_reversed: Delays, false start, lack of motivation, blocked creativity, hesitation.
love: passionate beginning, strong chemistry, romantic excitement, renewed desire
love_reversed: false start, lost spark, hesitation, blocked passion
career: creative spark, new business venture, inspired career beginning, taking initiative
career_reversed: delays, lack of motivation, blocked creativity, false start
spiritual: spiritual inspiration, awakening life force, creative purpose, acting on inner fire
spiritual_reversed: blocked inspiration, lost spark, hesitation, stalled creative fire

name: Two of Wands
meaning_upright: Planning, future vision, decision, expansion, the world in hand.
meaning_reversed: Fear of the unknown, playing it safe, poor planning, restlessness, indecision.
love: planning a romantic future, considering relationship options, shared ambitions, deciding what comes next
love_reversed: fear of the unknown, playing it safe, indecision, restlessness
career: career planning, future expansion, choosing between opportunities, ambitious professional vision
career_reversed: poor planning, fear of risk, indecision, limited vision
spiritual: expanding spiritual vision, choosing a path, planning purposeful growth, looking beyond familiar limits
spiritual_reversed: fear of the unknown, staying in the familiar, indecision, narrow vision

name: Three of Wands
meaning_upright: Progress, expansion, foresight, ships coming in, momentum.
meaning_reversed: Delays, obstacles to plans, limited vision, setbacks, impatience.
love: relationship expansion, waiting for love to develop, long-distance connection, looking toward the future together
love_reversed: delays, limited vision, romantic setbacks, impatience
career: business expansion, international work, long-term growth, waiting for results
career_reversed: obstacles to plans, delays, limited vision, setbacks
spiritual: faith in unfolding progress, broadening awareness, spiritual expansion, trusting long-term growth
spiritual_reversed: delayed growth, limited vision, obstacles to progress, impatience

name: Four of Wands
meaning_reversed: Instability at home, postponed celebration, transition, lack of support, shaky foundations.
love: relationship celebration, engagement, marriage, creating a happy home
love_reversed: postponed celebration, instability at home, shaky foundation, lack of support
career: workplace milestone, successful launch, team celebration, stable professional foundation
career_reversed: unstable footing, postponed milestone, transition, weak foundation
spiritual: sacred community, gratitude and celebration, spiritual stability, honoring a meaningful milestone
spiritual_reversed: unstable foundation, disrupted community, postponed harmony, seeking belonging

name: Five of Wands
meaning_upright: Conflict, competition, friction, clashing egos, scattered effort.
meaning_reversed: Avoiding conflict, resolution, inner conflict, release of tension, picking battles.
love: romantic tension, disagreements, competition for attention, conflicting desires
love_reversed: avoiding conflict, unresolved tension, inner disagreement, picking battles
career: workplace competition, conflicting ideas, professional rivalry, productive challenge
career_reversed: avoided conflict, released tension, inner competition, resolution near
spiritual: growth through challenge, testing beliefs, conflicting energies, learning through spiritual friction
spiritual_reversed: inner conflict, avoiding challenge, unresolved friction, seeking resolution

name: Six of Wands
meaning_upright: Victory, recognition, success, confidence, public acclaim.
meaning_reversed: Private victory, fall from grace, self-doubt, lack of recognition, ego inflation.
love: romantic success, feeling admired, public recognition of a relationship, winning someone’s affection
love_reversed: lack of recognition, self-doubt, private struggle, wounded pride
career: career recognition, promotion, public success, growing leadership credibility
career_reversed: lack of recognition, fall from grace, self-doubt, ego inflation
spiritual: confidence in your path, recognition of growth, inspired leadership, sharing spiritual progress
spiritual_reversed: wounded pride, lack of recognition, self-doubt, ego overtaking growth

name: Seven of Wands
meaning_upright: Defense, standing your ground, perseverance, conviction, holding advantage.
meaning_reversed: Overwhelm, giving up ground, exhaustion, defensiveness, yielding.
love: defending a relationship, maintaining boundaries, fighting for love, resisting outside pressure
love_reversed: overwhelm, giving up ground, defensiveness, exhaustion
career: defending your position, professional persistence, maintaining boundaries, standing your ground
spiritual: defending personal beliefs, spiritual conviction, energetic boundaries, remaining true to your path
spiritual_reversed: giving up ground, defensive exhaustion, wavering conviction, overwhelm

name: Eight of Wands
meaning_upright: Swift movement, momentum, news arriving, alignment, rapid progress.
meaning_reversed: Delays, frustration, scattered energy, missed timing, slowdown.
love: rapid romantic developments, passionate communication, unexpected messages, relationship momentum
love_reversed: delays, miscommunication, missed timing, stalled momentum
career: rapid career developments, fast communication, work-related travel, accelerated progress
career_reversed: delays, scattered energy, missed timing, frustration
spiritual: rapid spiritual movement, synchronicity, energetic alignment, receiving clear signs
spiritual_reversed: stalled momentum, missed signs, scattered energy, delayed alignment

name: Nine of Wands
meaning_upright: Resilience, last stand, persistence, guardedness, nearly there.
meaning_reversed: Burnout, paranoia, giving up at the end, rigid defenses, battle fatigue.
love: emotional guardedness, relationship resilience, cautious trust, protecting the heart
love_reversed: battle fatigue, rigid defenses, paranoia, giving up near the end
career: professional resilience, cautious persistence, nearing completion, protecting previous gains
career_reversed: burnout, rigid defensiveness, giving up at the end, exhaustion
spiritual: spiritual resilience, protecting your energy, perseverance after trials, wisdom gained through experience
spiritual_reversed: battle fatigue, rigid defenses, giving up near the goal, depleted resilience

name: Ten of Wands
meaning_upright: Burden, overload, responsibility, carrying too much, final effort.
meaning_reversed: Release, delegation, putting burdens down, collapse, learning to say no.
love: relationship burdens, emotional pressure, carrying too much responsibility, love feeling demanding
love_reversed: releasing burdens, collapse under pressure, learning to say no, delegating
career: overwork, excessive responsibility, burnout risk, need to delegate
career_reversed: putting burdens down, delegation, collapse, learning to say no
spiritual: spiritual burden, carrying inherited beliefs, need for release, simplifying your path
spiritual_reversed: releasing inherited burdens, letting go, simplifying the path, collapse before relief

name: Page of Wands
meaning_upright: Enthusiasm, exploration, free spirit, exciting news, curiosity.
meaning_reversed: Scattered energy, hasty starts, boredom, unreliable news, restlessness.
love: flirtation, exciting messages, playful attraction, curiosity about a new romance
love_reversed: scattered interest, boredom, unreliable messages, restlessness
career: career curiosity, exciting opportunity, learning through action, creative professional news
career_reversed: hasty starts, boredom, unreliable news, scattered focus
spiritual: spiritual curiosity, exploring new practices, enthusiastic discovery, a message of inspiration
spiritual_reversed: scattered enthusiasm, hasty exploration, boredom, unreliable inspiration

name: Knight of Wands
meaning_upright: Action, adventure, passion, bold pursuit, charisma.
meaning_reversed: Impulsiveness, recklessness, scattered passion, delays in action, hot temper.
love: passionate pursuit, intense chemistry, impulsive romance, an exciting but inconsistent lover
love_reversed: impulsive romance, hot and cold, recklessness, scattered passion
career: ambitious action, bold career change, entrepreneurial drive, impulsive professional decisions
career_reversed: impulsive decisions, recklessness, delays in action, hot temper
spiritual: passionate spiritual pursuit, adventurous exploration, acting on inspiration, restless searching
spiritual_reversed: scattered passion, reckless pursuit, impatience, restless searching

name: Queen of Wands
meaning_reversed: Insecurity, jealousy, demanding nature, burnout, dimmed confidence.
love: confidence in love, magnetic attraction, warmth and passion, independent partnership
love_reversed: insecurity, jealousy, demanding energy, dimmed confidence
career: career confidence, creative leadership, professional charisma, independent success
spiritual: radiant spiritual confidence, intuitive creativity, embodied passion, inspiring others
spiritual_reversed: dimmed confidence, insecurity, comparison, blocked self-expression

name: King of Wands
meaning_upright: Visionary leadership, boldness, entrepreneurship, mastery of fire, inspiration.
meaning_reversed: Arrogance, tyranny, impulsive leadership, unfulfilled vision, domineering.
love: bold romantic leadership, passionate commitment, protective affection, pursuing love with confidence
career: visionary leadership, business growth, decisive action, inspiring others
career_reversed: arrogance, impulsive leadership, tyranny, unrealized vision
spiritual: spiritual leadership, purposeful vision, directing creative energy, courageous guidance
spiritual_reversed: misused vision, arrogance, impulsive leadership, ego over purpose
